The '''Cobral father''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Fregan]] from the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Frego]]. He was the husband of [[Zanita Cobral]] and father of three sons, [[Solan Cobral|Solan]], [[Bard Cobral|Bard]], and [[Rutin Cobral|Rutin]], He [[Death/Legends|died]] circa [[44 BBY/Legends|44 BBY]] of natural causes.

==Behind the scenes==
The Cobral father is never [[canon]]ically named, only being referred to as "Rutin's father."

==Appearances==
*''[[Jedi Apprentice: The Only Witness]]'' {{1stm}}
